description: Create two FTP-only user accounts for the 'acmecorp.test' virtual server. The first user, 'alice_dev', should have the real name Alice Chen, password DevAccess2024!, FTP enabled, email disabled, no shell access (/bin/false), and home directory /home/acmecorp/public_html. The second user, 'dave_uploads', should have the real name Dave Martinez, password UploaderPass99!, FTP enabled, email disabled, no shell access (/bin/false), and home directory /home/acmecorp/public_html/uploads (create if needed).
